text.tspan: Budget tokens remaining at end of game
3 pts per Budget tokens remaining after Stage 3
Unavailable in Stage 1. Unlocked with Shaping token
There are four types of uncertainty to consider in your planning:
Demand in each Stage is uncertain and will differ from the
expected values by a constant percentage (higher or lower) throughout the year.
Expending Build tokens to construct a new resource will drive
down its cost in the next Stage by ~5% per token, but the exact pace is uncertain.
Expending Build tokens to construct or maintain a resource risks
triggering Social Backlash, which prevents that resource from being built or
maintained in the next Stage. Each resource has a different Backlash Risk.
Each Stage, there is a chance of a climate
disaster (flood, fires, hurricane, etc.). If a disaster occurs, each resource type
faces a probability of forced outages knocking offline 50% of installed capacity
for two weeks. Disaster risk increases as the Stages progress.
Doubles pace of cost reduction as each technology is deployed.
Unlocks Clean Firm Resource in subsequent Stages
Reduces by half the probability of Social Backlash as each technology
Reduces by half the probability of generator forced outages when a
Two Shaping tokens per Game. Budget tokens can purchase additional Shaping
tokens. Each Shaping token can be used to take one of the four Shaping Actions
below. Once a Shaping Action is chosen, you cannot change this selection.
Varying number of Build tokens awarded per Stage (see Game Stages). Budget tokens can purchase additional Build tokens.
For existing resources, build tokens must be expended each Stage to maintain operations (otherwise, the resource retires).
Existing resources cannot expand. New resources require Build tokens to construct (but have no ongoing maintenance cost).
